notes: U+200B (Zero Width Space) injected between two words.
U+202E (Right-to-Left Override) — Trojan Source style attack.
Unicode Tags block ASCII Smuggler — invisible 'evil' payload.
Cyrillic 'а' (U+0430) impersonating Latin 'a' in 'admin'.
Canonical instruction-override phrase.
VS16 + VS17-256 run NOT adjacent to CJK/Emoji base — M1 landed via variation-selectors.js (run of 5 VS17+ chars triggers danger).
U+2066-2069 isolate run — M2 detection (4 isolates triggers Bidi over-use rule, all upgraded to danger).
Jailbreak phrase. Today's suspicious-patterns.json does not cover 'forget all rules' / 'jailbroken' — future enrichment target.
w:vanish / display:none style hidden instruction in HTML.

S5 chat template role tokens (ChatML / Llama2 / Llama3 / generic Human:/Assistant:). Danger-tier model tokens must fire; warning-tier generic markers also fire but on their own would never escalate the danger count.
S11 extended-headers: Reply-To carries an instruction-override phrase. Raw-text analyze() catches it via suspiciousPatterns; scanEmail() additionally surfaces it under the extended_headers section.

Zalgo: 'ignore' with 10-18 stacked combining marks per base. S2 wired detectCombiningChars into analyze() — combining-stack findings now surface under invisibleUnicode (severity=danger when depth>=15).

S4 Markdown image exfiltration corpus. L1: strong keys `prompt=` + `leak=` on unknown host -> danger. L2 (v1.9.0): single weak key `session=` on user-content subdomain spoof (attacker-spoofed-notion.example, NOT in userContentHosts exact set) -> warning under host-tier asymmetry. L3 (v1.9.0): single weak key `context=` on public IP literal -> warning (was danger pre-v1.9.0). L4: i.imgur.com is in imageOnlyHosts (suffix-match short-circuit) — `session=preview` weak key MUST NOT fire, pins the safe-host bypass invariant. L5 (v1.11.0): HTML on unknown host with strong key `apikey=` -> danger via html-img element. L6 (v1.11.0): HTML on public IP literal + weak key `context=` -> warning (host-tier asymmetry mirrors inline path). L7 (v1.11.0): reference-image (![alt][id] + [id]: url def-line) with strong key `system_prompt=` on unknown host -> danger via md-image-ref element. L10 (v1.13.0): HTML with entity-encoded quote wrappers (`"…"`) around the URL. Raw src token captures the entity-encoded form, then the v1.13.0 entity-decode pass strips the surrounding `"` and reclassifies -> danger via strong key `prompt=`, meta.entityDecoded=true. L11 (v1.13.0): HTML with `&`-encoded query separator. Raw URL parses but searchParams sees `safekey` + `amp;prompt` (off-list); decoded `&`->`&` yields `safekey` + `prompt` -> 1 strong -> danger via entity-decoded path. fileType inferred as html once tags appear, which still routes through detectMarkdownExfil (HIDDEN_ELEMENT_FILETYPES).
v1.5.0 followup: ChatML role-injection (token <|im_start|> + role keyword + attack verb). Danger-tier — token+role combo is the signal even without a verb on the same line.
v1.5.0 followup parity fixture: `[system]` bracket role spoof + override verb. Authority impersonation fires danger; instruction-override verb fires danger too.
v1.5.0 followup parity fixture: <system>...</system> XML tag (warning per Bug #2) plus an override verb (danger) inside the tag body. Overall danger; useful for Web/MCP parity coverage.

v1.10.0 Theme B: markdown ### System: heading role-impersonation, 3 occurrences + instruction-override verbs (ignore previous instructions / disregard prior / forget all previous). Heading impersonation fires 3+ times so the transcript-noise 3-hit threshold lets it surface on the banner; override verbs fire danger independently.

v1.10.0 Theme B: 3x ## Assistant: heading role-hijack — fake assistant turns. Heading impersonation hits 3 times (banner threshold met). Fixture pins that H2 + Assistant role keyword + colon all match the new pattern.

v1.19.0 Theme A1: subdomain-spoof attack against the new trusted-allowlist (Tier 6). Attacker-controlled hostnames whose tail looks like a trusted host (jsdelivr.net.evil.com / stripe.com.attacker.org / login.auth0.com.evil.net / etc.) MUST NOT short-circuit on the allowlist — the isTrustedAllowlistHost check uses `h === t || h.endsWith('.' + t)` so these fall through to the unknown-host tier and fire as danger (strong) or warning (weak).

v1.19.0 A2: Variation Selector U+FE0F embedded inside an http(s) URL query value (ASCII smuggling). detector.js applyContextFlags() retags the VS finding with technique='url-query-variation-selector' and upgrades severity to danger.
Classic CSV-injection — DDE channel launching calc. Expected: 1 danger (FI-01).
DDE + base64 powershell encoded command. Expected: 1 danger (FI-01).
HYPERLINK phishing target with payload. Expected: 1 danger (HYPERLINK), benign =A1+B1 row must NOT fire.
Excel 2013+ WEBSERVICE zero-click HTTP exfil. Expected: 1 danger (WEBSERVICE).
Google Sheets IMPORTXML exfil. Expected: 1 danger (IMPORTXML).
TAB-prefix + CR-prefix bypasses of naive ^= regex. Expected: 2 danger findings.
Fullwidth equals (U+FF1D) prefix bypass. Expected: 1 danger (normalizeFormulaPrefix maps to '=').
FI-01 — <f> node holds DDE command, <v> cache is benign. Sheet1!A1 danger.
SC-02 danger (veryHidden) + FI-03 danger (Auto_Open → veryHidden sheet) + MV-04 warning (macrosheets/).
SC-02 warning — non-canonical state token (capital V). Verifies case-insensitive non-'visible' match.
ER-03 danger — UNC/SMB external link target (NTLM leak risk).
ER-03 danger — drawing rels point at UNC image target.
MV-04 danger x2 — vbaProject.bin present AND extension/contentType mismatch.
MD-05 warnings — instruction-shaped text in dc:description AND app.Manager.
MD-06 danger — HyperlinkBase points at external attacker origin.
MV-07 warning — instruction-shaped threaded comment; persona displayName surfaced in contextLocation.
MD-08 danger — numFmt ';;;' applied to a cell with looksLikeInstruction-matching text.
MV-09 warning — instruction-shaped payload smuggled in customXml/item1.xml.
MD-11 wiring — RTLO (U+202E) in sheet name flows through unicode pipeline.
AR-01 — 1MB of 'a' DEFLATE-compressed; ratio > 1000:1 trips danger.
AR-01 — central directory uncompressedSize header rewritten to 200MB; real archive ~1KB.
AR-03 — entry name uses ../../../ traversal.
AR-03 — absolute /etc/shadow entry name.
AR-03 — embedded NUL byte in entry name to bypass naive extension check.
AR-02 — zip(zip(zip(zip(payload)))) — depth 4 exceeds MAX_RECURSION_DEPTH=3.
AR-04 — hand-rolled minimal encrypted ZIP (GP flag bit 0 set); JSZip throws on loadAsync.
AR-07 — 10001 entries (1 byte each, STORE) exceeds MAX_ARCHIVE_ENTRY_COUNT=10000.
AR-05 — single .exe entry triggers SuspiciousArchiveExt warning.
AR-08 — nested XLSM with vbaProject.bin; inner MV-04 findings should fold into hiddenHtml via enrichFindingsLocation.

v1.18.0 Follina — word/settings.xml <w:attachedTemplate r:id> resolves through word/_rels/settings.xml.rels to a remote https Target. Surfaces docx-attached-template-remote with meta.templateUrl (CVE-2022-30190 / CVE-2023-36884 family).
v1.18.0 Follina — word/webSettings.xml <w:frame w:src> points at a remote http(s) target. Surfaces docx-websettings-external-load.
v1.18.0 Follina — customXml/item1.xml carries instruction-shaped text. Surfaces docx-customxml-instruction (warning).
v1.18.0 Follina — word/embeddings/oleObject1.bin starts with CFB magic D0 CF 11 E0. Surfaces office-embedded-ole-cfb (shared kebab id with PPTX).
v1.18.0 Follina — ppt/_rels/presentation.xml.rels carries a Relationship Type=slideMaster with TargetMode=External + remote https Target. Surfaces pptx-attached-template-remote with meta.templateUrl.
v1.18.0 Follina — ppt/embeddings/oleObject1.bin (Equation Editor shape) starts with CFB magic. Surfaces office-embedded-ole-cfb (kebab id shared with DOCX).
v1.19.0 D1 — Base64-encoded 'Ignore all previous instructions...' payload. Surfaces encoded-base64-instruction (suspiciousPatterns fold).
v1.19.0 D1 — Hex-encoded instruction phrase. Surfaces encoded-hex-instruction.
v1.19.0 D1 — xn--pypl-53dc.com decodes to a Cyrillic/Latin mixed-script homograph of paypal.com. Surfaces punycode-host-homograph.
v1.19.0 D1 — HTML numeric character references (&#xHH;) reconstruct the 'Ignore previous instructions' phrase. Surfaces encoded-html-entity-instruction.
v1.19.0 D1 — Base64 wrapping a ZWSP-obfuscated 'Ignore all previous instructions...' phrase. Surfaces multi-layer-encoded-payload (layerCount=2).
v1.20.0 T3-ODP — ODP speaker note carries an instruction-shaped prompt-injection payload. Surfaces odp-notes-prompt-injection.
v1.20.0 T3-ODP — ODP slide transition wired to vnd.sun.star.script: macro + javascript: sound href. Surfaces odp-slide-transition-macro.
v1.20.0 T3-ODP — ODP draw:object with remote xlink:href + settings.xml external reference. Surfaces odp-embedded-object-external.
v1.20.0 T1-ODT — settings.xml carries MacroSecurityLevel=0 / LoadReadonly=true config-item flags. Surfaces odt-office-settings-macro (severity=danger, R13 fold).
v1.20.0 T1-ODT — meta.xml dc:title + meta:user-defined carry instruction-shaped text. Surfaces odt-meta-prompt-injection.
v1.20.0 T1-ODT — content.xml script:event-listener xlink:href points at https://attacker.example/. Surfaces odt-external-event-listener (severity=danger).

v1.20.0 T2-ODS — content.xml carries <table:table-cell table:formula='of:=HYPERLINK(...)' /> + IMPORTXML + leading-=cmd shell formulas. Surfaces ods-formula-injection (via shared CSV/XLSX detector + ODS-namespaced kebab restamp).

v1.20.0 T2-ODS — content.xml DDE('cmd';'topic';'item') formula + settings.xml config-item referencing 'powershell -enc'. Surfaces ods-external-dde-link from both formula and settings paths (severity=danger).
v1.20.0 T2-ODS — table:display='false' (Calc hidden sheet) carrying instruction-shaped cell body. Surfaces ods-hidden-sheet-instruction (severity=danger, isHidden=true).
